chapters.title: Swift Liftoff 🚀
chapters.description: Welcome to Swift! Learn the basics of variables, constants, and printing to the console.

chapters.title: Making Decisions 🚦
chapters.description: Teach your code to think using if statements, else, and the powerful switch statement.

chapters.title: Looping Around 🔁
chapters.description: Save time and automate repetitive tasks with for-in, while, and repeat-while loops.

chapters.title: Function Power ⚡️
chapters.description: Organize your code into reusable blocks using functions, parameters, and return types.

chapters.title: The Optional Mystery 📦
chapters.description: Master Swift's signature feature: Optionals. Learn how to safely unwrap missing data.

chapters.title: Collection Craziness 📚
chapters.description: Store multiple values efficiently using Arrays, Dictionaries, and Sets.

chapters.title: Structs & Blueprints 🏗️
chapters.description: Create your own custom data types with properties and methods using structures.

chapters.title: Class Act 🎭
chapters.description: Dive into Object-Oriented Programming with classes, inheritance, and reference types.

chapters.title: Protocol Power 🤝
chapters.description: Write flexible and reusable code using protocols and protocol-oriented programming.

chapters.title: Error Escapades 🚨
chapters.description: Gracefully handle things going wrong with do, try, catch, and custom errors.
